entries.title: 英语中的日语罗马音释义
entries.tags:
okobo（日本木屐）、hikimayu（黛眉，即剃掉眉毛后画上去的眉毛）、obi（和服腰带）、obiage（装饰腰带顶部的一块长方形布）、obijime（和服腰带的绳子）、tasuki（收起固定和服长袖所用的系带）、kine（日语中的木槌）、kimono
（和服）、hakama（袴，即巫女装所着笔直的裙[裤？]）、serafuku（水手服）、ofuda （符纸）、hitodama （人魂鬼火）、yukata（浴衣）、zouri （和风拖鞋/木屐）、miko（巫女[服]）、uchiwa（圆扇）、veranda（日系木走廊）、shimenawa（注连绳，外貌近编织绳，为神道信仰中用于洁净的咒具，多见于神社）、uchikake（打掛、即更为华丽高贵的一种和服款式，所谓的白无垢为此类之一）、wataboushi（綿帽子，即御寒用棉质兜帽，也称新娘婚礼的头纱）、haori（羽织，即和服外的短款外套）、nakadashi（中出）、torii（鸟居）、onee-shota（指小孩开大车）、furisode（振袖，即更为长款的和服长袖）、tabi（足袋，二趾袜）、yokozuwari（侧坐，即手一侧撑地，双腿向另一侧稍微舒展平放的坐姿）、mesugaki（雌小鬼）、tareme（下垂眼角，常用于表现弱气角色）、tsurime（上挑眼角、常用来表现强气角色）、uwabaki（室内鞋，类似国内小学的小白布鞋）、randoseru（书包，实际英语而非罗马音，一种由缝合的硬皮革或类皮革合成材料制成的硬边背包）、netorare（ntr）、shota（正太控）、wagashi（和菓子，对日本传统的麻糬、冰品、水果制品、甜味内馅、咸味零食、油炸小点心、蛋糕和饼干的一个总称）、taiyaki（鲷鱼烧）、zettai ryouiki（绝对领域，即大腿袜与裙底之间的露出肌肤部分）、konpeitou（金平糖）、donbei （どん兵衛，咚兵卫，日清下属泡面品牌）、nissin（日清，日本著名食品品牌）、kitsune udon（狐狸乌冬面、特指带有一整块油炸豆腐的乌冬面）、jitome（锐利目光，多含负面情感）、mecha musume（メカ娘，mecha shōjo，即机甲女孩，机娘；与兵器娘【兵器娘，heiki musume，即军武娘化】不同，本身就是一种军械）、nengajo（贺年卡）、plugsuits（实际英语，プラグスーツ，eva协助操纵机甲的紧身衣作战服）、mizura（美豆良、角髪，用来形容日本弥生（yayoi）时代人的那种把头发环绕扎成几圈在耳朵旁边的发型）、ahoge（呆毛）、shouji（用作墙壁、隔断或推拉门的纸屏风）、2koma（指一页内一格正常一格瞬间败北的超短漫画）、egasumi（江户幕，一种云纹）、doyagao（沾沾自喜的表情）、Iaido（居合道）、battoujutsu（拔刀术）、tsurara-onna（冰柱女，与雪女有别）、mizu happi（水法被，一种形似短款和服的庆典礼服）、enpera（亦称mafumoko，当头发蓬松地垂在围巾或类似服饰上方时的样子）、kouhaku nawa（特指红白相间的注连绳）、shide（纸垂，锯齿状的纸幡，通常附在注连绳或玉剣上，以划定空间）、jirai kei（地雷系，此处特指服装风格）、kanzashi（日语簪子）、hadanugi dousa（一种服装款式，和服的左上或右上部分被脱至腰部）、kodomo doushi（特指儿童间性行为）、kyuubi（九尾）、bishounen（美少年）、mojyo（丧女）、jimiko（土妹子、指外貌不张扬且内向的少女）、

entries.title: 一套视角光线词
entries.tags: dynamic angle,depth of field,high contrast,colorful,detailed light,light leaks,beautiful detailed glow,best shadow,shiny skin,cinematic lighting,ray tracing,from above,female focus,close-up,dutch angle,

entries.title: 光影质量词
entries.tags: cinematic shot,dynamic angle,cinematic shadows,action,shot,deepshadows,award winning,beautifully lit,dramatic angle,intense angle,dynamic angle,cinematic lighting,cinematic angle,dramatic angle,dramatic shadows,

entries.title: 常规视角tag
entries.tags:
wide shot：广角，缩小人物增加背景展示
cowboy shot：人物七分身镜头
fisheye：鱼眼镜头，能出非常夸张的透视
close-up：特写，视画风而定具体人物缩放大小，一般可以有效解决图糊的问题
head/feet+out of frame： 头/脚出框
身体部位+focus：重点表现某一身体部分，另有solo focus，效果与close-up类似
dutch angle：荷兰角（不）斜角镜头，让你的景色看起来没那么正
vanishing point：远景透视，尚未测试，效果不确定
panorama：全景，比wide shot效果更明显
pov(first-person view)：第一人称，无需多言
foreshortening：正前缩距，一定程度有效，增强正面透视和靠近效果
perspective：透视，优化透视效果

entries.title: shadow：阴影，增加阴影效果
entries.tags:
colorful：色彩丰富，质量词
detailed light/detailed lighting：细致的光线，质量词

entries.title: light leaks：漏光，指摄像时的散光，ai效果一般
entries.tags:
sunlight：阳光，此外存在月光（moonlight）和星光（starlight），不过此二者效果相对一般
bokeh：散景，表示在景深较浅的摄影成像中，落在景深以外的画面，会有逐渐产生松散模糊的效果，与blurry background效果类似

entries.title: blurry foreground：模糊前景，效果顾名思义，意图增加前景遮挡效果可用
entries.tags: ray tracing：光线追踪，质量词

entries.title: cinematic lighting：电影级灯光，有一点点效果，基本可以视作质量词
entries.tags:
see-through silhouette：透视轮廓，透视光照射半透明物体（如纱裙等）后的剪影
strong contrast：强对比度，与高对比度high contrast相同，不赘述
light and shadow：光影，一般是增加了阴影，实际就是单shadow效果
light particles：光粒子，增加一堆光点
light spot/floating light spot：光点/浮动光斑，实际等效于光粒子，效果略次

entries.title: volumetric lights：体积光，一般是一种窗外射入的光束表现，有一定效果
entries.tags: backlighting/sidelighting：背光/侧光，从背后/侧面投射的光，

entries.title: chiaroscuro：明暗对照，等效两个对比度，效果相对更弱
entries.tags:
dramatic shadow：戏剧性阴影，质量词
high-key and low-variance brightness scale：高调和低方差亮度等级，质量词
rim lighting：边缘灯光，一种摄影技术，照亮拍摄对象的边缘以产生光晕效果，效果未知
light rendering ：光渲染，质量词
light-rays：光线，质量词

entries.title: dappled sunlight：斑驳阳光，阳光穿过树荫照射的表现，效果很好
entries.tags: sunshine through window：透过窗户的阳光，顾名思义

entries.title: 常规色彩tag
entries.tags:
xxx theme：XX颜色主题：让你的画面色调偏某种颜色，如blue theme会让画面偏蓝
monochrome：单色，尽量减少其他颜色表现，与xxx theme搭配使用，单走一般是黑白灰效果，
black and white：黑白，等效单走monochrome，可加强该词效果
limited palette：有限调色板，与monochrome效果类似，不赘述
xxx lighting：XX颜色光线，效果同名，不赘述

entries.title: ff gradien：ff 渐变，一种应用于黑白画面的彩虹渐变，效果较为一般
entries.tags:
inverted colors：反转颜色，反色效果，一般没用
colorful：色彩丰富，质量词

entries.title: 丝线汲取
entries.tags: 1girl,solo,1.6::kneeling beside a rain puddle on a city rooftop,pale white "memory-steam" tendrils coalescing from the water's surface instead of evaporating::,1.5::a cautious,reaching gesture,her fingers passing through a tendril as fragmented visions of strangers' memories flicker around her hand,expression caught between empathy and intrusion::,1.5::a simple dark raincoat contrasted against the warm-tinted spectral tendrils,lit by the cool neon reflections in the water and the deep blue of the clear post-rain night sky::,1.4::visuals blend thermal imaging for warmth and holographic projection for memory fragments,creating transient clarity within the mist::,1.3::textures of wet asphalt,condensing vapor,shimmering heat-haze distortions,and pixelated memory glimpses::,1.2::background of rooftop vents and distant city lights,all veiled by the rising haze of collective urban memory::,masterpiece,emotional archaeology,a portrait of solitude touching the ghostly residue of others' lives left in the rain.

entries.title: 破败电台
entries.tags: 1girl,solo,1.6::leaning against a rusted television antenna under a full moon,tendrils of dead radio waves seeping from corroded joints,composed of historical broadcast remnants and static::,1.5::a strained,listening pose,hands gripping her modified headset as spectral tendrils plug into its ports,forcing her to hear echoes of the past,expression tense with overload::,1.5::urban explorer attire contrasted against the rust-and-static texture of the wave-tendrils,lit by the cold moonlight and the ghostly glow of vintage test patterns overlaying the moon's surface::,1.4::multiple radio spectrogram layers visualize different eras as colored frequency lines,with her form a bright digital signal point amidst the analog noise::,1.3::textures of oxidized metal,crystallized static,worn headphones,and shifting signal graphs::,1.2::background of a vast night sky,its darkness textured with faint,overlapping transmission waves from decades past::,spectral haunting,the weight of broadcast history forcibly channeled through a single listener under the test-pattern moon.

entries.title: 原版
entries.tags: in this image,boy is standing with his back to a wall,looking at a row of clown masks hanging in front of him. the wall is a stark metallic gray,with large screws holding it in place. the masks are distorted,with various expressions ranging from cheerful to unsettling,with some having crosses in their eyes or sad,smeared faces. the masks are dripping with a vibrant magenta-colored liquid,giving a disturbing contrast to the otherwise monochromatic background. kokichi is holding one of the masks in his hand,his face obscured by his messy purple hair and the checkered scarf around his neck. his posture is slightly hunched,exuding a feeling of unease. the image gives off an eerie and dark atmosphere,with the contrast of bright pink liquid against the cold,industrial backdrop heightening the sense of tension and mystery.konya karasue,rella,tokkyu,smile,

entries.title: 草地私会
entries.tags:
1boy,1girl,cowboy shot,lying on grass,from above,smile,In a secluded grove deep within a forest, where sunlight filters down in warm, hazy shafts through the dense emerald canopy, boy holds girl in a tender embrace. The light dapples the forest floor, illuminating floating dust motes and creating an ethereal glow around them, isolating them in a pocket of profound quietude.the boy, his usual sharp demeanor softened by an intense, protective tenderness, leans down to press a soft, lingering kiss on girl's forehead.
girl, cradled securely in his arms, appears serene with her eyes closed and a soft, contented smile gracing her lips, fully immersed in the warm intimacy of the moment. Her light-colored, nature-themed attire seems to absorb the gentle light, while boy's darker clothing provides a contrasting depth. The air is still and warm, filled only with the distant, muted sounds of the forest, heightening the sense of a private world shared only by them. The scene is suffused with a gentle, almost sacred intimacy, hinting at a deep, complex bond that flourishes in this sun-kissed, hidden sanctuary.

entries.title: 镜中背离
entries.tags: solo,looking at viewer,closed mouth,smile,cowboy shot,three-quarter view,off-center right,mirror,broken glass,crack,different reflection,clasped hands,light particles,sparkle,from behind,looking back,a tight medium close-up at eye level frames the girl on the right side of the composition while an ornate oval mirror fills the left half. she turns slightly toward the viewer with a soft,cheerful smile,her expression warm and composed,while the figure inside the mirror faces forward with a darker,more sinister gaz. the two do not behave like a perfect reflection; instead,they appear as separate presences sharing the same face yet conveying different emotions. her raised hand aligns with the glass between them as glowing orange cracks streak downward,casting warm highlights across their features and heightening the contrast between the bright,friendly exterior and the ominous counterpart within the shadowed mirror.

entries.title: 一叶知秋
entries.tags:
This image shows a cheerful and vibrant young girl standing outdoors,enjoying the beauty of autumn. The warm sunlight bathes her in a soft,golden glow,complementing the vibrant orange,yellow,and red leaves scattered in the background. She playfully holds a bright red maple leaf up to her face,covering one eye with it as she smiles brightly. Her outfit consists of a cozy,light blue cardigan and a neutral-colored turtleneck.
The atmosphere is full of lighthearted joy and a sense of fun as she engages with the natural surroundings. The falling leaves add to the sense of movement,as if they are dancing in the breeze alongside her. Her expression exudes warmth and happiness,creating an inviting and heartwarming feeling,as though she's sharing this peaceful moment of autumn with the viewer.outdoors,day,blurry foreground,foreground,-1::building::,colorful,dappled sunlight,sunlight,light rays,yellow theme,photographic reference,depth of field,photo background,3::cinematic angle,cinematic lighting::,lens flare,

entries.tags:
原Tag：A girl stands in a ruined street at dusk,holding a golden apple covered in sand. Dusty winds swirl around collapsed buildings and cracked concrete. Her clean hands,free of bloodstains,cradle the glowing fruit near her chest. A pistol lies abandoned among rubble at her feet. Rotting organic matter floats in a nearby storm drain,blending shadows with decaying textures.
原Tag：nsfw,nude,legs apart,split,nipples,sitting,dark theme,A girl sits unconscious in a dark spaceship cabin's mechanical seat,her completely naked body connected to life-support systems. Her pussy is spread by mechanical tentacles. Two thick transparent tubes pump red liquid into her neck and back while thin metal probes pierce her limbs and torso. A safety belt crosses her waist,a brown teddy bear rests on the seat near the girl. Glowing blue screens displaying biometric data float at upper left near the curved cabin wall. Shadowy machinery surrounds the chair with faint indicator lights dotting the control panels. The dim environment reveals faint condensation on tubes and pale skin illuminated by equipment glows.
翻译：nsfw、裸体、双腿分开、分裂、乳头、坐着、黑暗主题、一个女孩昏迷不醒地坐在黑暗的宇宙飞船舱室的机械座椅上，她完全赤裸的身体与生命维持系统相连。她的阴部被机械触手张开。两根粗大的透明管子将红色液体泵入她的颈部和背部，同时细长的金属探针刺穿她的四肢和躯干。一条安全带绕过她的腰部，一只棕色的泰迪熊放在女孩附近的座位上。显示生物特征数据的发光蓝色屏幕漂浮在靠近弯曲的舱壁的左上方。阴暗的机器环绕着椅子，微弱的指示灯点缀在控制面板上。昏暗的环境中，管子上微弱的冷凝水和被设备光芒照亮的苍白皮肤清晰可见。
原Tag：A serene,ethereal world with a girl standing on a flat surface. The sky is vast and blue,dotted with fluffy white clouds. The girl has long,flowing hair and is dressed in a light,airy outfit,reflecting the peaceful atmosphere. Her figure is mirrored in the calm water below her feet,creating a mesmerizing reflection. The overall style is anime-inspired,with soft,pastel colors and gentle,dreamlike lighting. The scene captures a sense of tranquility and wonder,blending nature and the fantastical.
原Tag：indian style,naked towel,holding ice cream,licking,a steam-filled sauna surrounds the girl,wooden benches glowing amber under soft lighting. she leans against cedar walls,wisps of vapor clinging to her relaxed posture as droplets trail down heated rocks. birch branches release a faint woody fragrance,blending with the rhythmic crackle of burning logs in the corner furnace. sunlight filters through a small frosted window,casting soft geometric patterns on the mist. the girl sits quietly with eyes closed,her breath syncing with the hiss of water splashing on scorched stones. warmth radiates from terracotta tiles beneath her feet while condensation drips along copper pipes overhead.

原Tag：the composition centers on a detailed figurine of a young girl,viewed in profile from the left foreground. she wears a simple white t-shirt adorned with a pink graphic design. her gaze is directed intently towards the right,her hands hovering near the surface of a brightly illuminated glass display case,conveying a sense of curiosity or admiration.occupying the right side of the frame,inside the display case,stands a prominent,intricately designed mecha or robot figurine. this imposing figure features a complex grey and silver armored exoskeleton with accents of red plating,particularly visible on the chest and joints. its design incorporates sharp angles,multiple layers of armor,and articulated limbs,culminating in a helmeted head with pointed crests and glowing orange optical sensors or eyes. the robot is posed dynamically,facing slightly towards the viewer and the girl figurine.the display case housing the robot is brightly lit from above by cool,blue-white light strips,which cast strong highlights and deep shadows across the robot's metallic surfaces,emphasizing its form and texture. visible reflections shimmer on the glass barrier separating the girl from the displayed items. behind the primary robot figure,numerous other smaller anime girl figurines are arranged on shelves within the same case,adding depth and context to the display.in the background,beyond the girl figurine and partially obscured by a shallow depth of field,are shelves densely packed with various forms of merchandise,likely anime figures,dvds,or other collectibles,rendered in warmer tones. this background is softly blurred,employing a bokeh effect that draws focus to the foreground interaction between the girl figurine and the robot display,creating a scene reminiscent of a collector's room or a specialty hobby shop.
翻译：构图的中心是一个精致的年轻女孩小雕像，从左前景观看，呈侧面造型。她穿着一件简单的白色 T 恤，上面装饰着粉色图案。她的目光专注地望向右侧，双手悬停在明亮的玻璃展示柜表面附近，传达出好奇或钦佩的感觉。在画面右侧，展示柜内，矗立着一个显眼、设计精巧的机甲或机器人小雕像。这个威风的人物具有复杂的灰色和银色装甲外骨骼，带有红色镀层，尤其是在胸部和关节处。它的设计融合了锐利的角度、多层装甲和铰接式四肢，最终形成一个戴着头盔的头部，头部有尖尖的冠冕和发光的橙色光学传感器或眼睛。机器人摆出动态姿势，略微面向观众和女孩人偶。放置机器人的展示柜上方被蓝白色冷光条照亮，在机器人的金属表面上投射出强烈的高光和深色阴影，突出了机器人的形态和质感。将女孩与展示品隔开的玻璃屏障上，反射的光线清晰可见。在主机器人人偶的后面，许多其他较小的动漫女孩人偶排列在同一个展示柜的架子上，为展示增添了深度和背景。在背景中，在女孩人偶的后面，被浅景深部分遮挡的，是密密麻麻地摆放着各种商品的架子，可能是动漫人偶、DVD 或其他收藏品，色调较暖。背景经过柔和虚化，采用散景效果，将焦点吸引到女孩人偶和机器人展示之间的前景互动上，营造出一种让人联想到收藏家房间或专业爱好商店的场景。
原Tag：the scene is depicted with bright,even illumination consistent with a retail environment. the image portrays an aisle within what appears to be a hobby or model kit store,densely stocked with merchandise. white metal shelving units line the walls,filled neatly with numerous packaged model kits. the boxes predominantly feature artwork of futuristic mecha,spaceships,and particularly female characters integrated with cybernetic or mechanical components,rendered in a similar anime aesthetic. many boxes share a color scheme involving shades of pink,white,and grey,suggesting a specific product line or theme.dominating the central background is a large,eye-catching vertical display or poster showcasing a detailed illustration of a female character. this character embodies a blend of human and machine,clad in minimal,form-fitting cybernetic armor that reveals significant portions of her physique while incorporating complex mechanical elements,including large weapon attachments and propulsion units extending from her back and arms. she has long,dark hair and large,expressive eyes typical of the genre,gazing towards the viewer.in the foreground and midground,shoppers interact with the environment. on the right,a young boy and a slightly younger girl,presumably siblings,are shown from the back and side respectively. the boy stands observing the shelves,while the girl reaches towards a stack of model kit boxes placed on the floor,seemingly examining them. both are dressed casually. partially visible in the extreme foreground is the head and shoulders of another young girl with similar hair color to the central character,adding depth to the scene but obscuring the lower portion of the view. the overall composition emphasizes the abundance of specialized merchandise and the consumer environment associated with anime and mecha model kits.

原Tag：this is a pixel art illustration in a retro anime style,characterized by a color palette dominated by deep blues,purples,and contrasting pinks with bright white accents,defined by distinct pixelated outlines,and an overall blocky,pixelated texture. the image employs a dark theme,with strong backlighting originating from a prominent circular celestial body,creating a moody lighting effect where elements appear to glow in the dark.
the composition is centered around three female characters rendered in an anime aesthetic. the central figure,positioned prominently against a large,luminous white circular backdrop suggestive of a full moon,gazes directly forward with an enigmatic expression. she possesses long,flowing blue hair that cascades over her shoulders and wears attire that hints at a fantasy or mystical setting,with discernible details in her clothing despite the pixelated rendering. flanking her are two other female characters,contributing to a balanced triangular arrangement. the character on the left,featuring shorter,tousled reddish-pink hair,is depicted from a three-quarter back view,her head turned slightly as if looking towards or past the central figure. the character on the right,distinguished by long,flowing pink hair and a noticeable antenna-like ahoge,is presented in profile,gazing towards the central character,her features clearly defined against the dark background.
dominating the mid-ground,beneath the trio of characters,is a prominent title in large,stylized white japanese script,this title is intricately interwoven with ornate,pixelated filigree patterns resembling stylized floral motifs or baroque scrollwork,rendered in shades of blue,light blue,and white,adding a layer of decorative complexity to the visual hierarchy. the background consists of a dark,deep blue expanse,simulating a night sky,which is subtly animated with small,twinkling pixelated stars and delicate vertical streaks of light that suggest a gentle fall of celestial particles,enhancing the ethereal atmosphere.
at the bottom of the frame,three distinct rectangular buttons,characteristic of a video game's main menu interface,are aligned horizontally. these buttons are rendered with a pixelated bevel effect,giving them a slightly three-dimensional appearance. each button features capitalized english text in a bold,sans-serif pixel font. the leftmost button reads "start." the central button displays "jrpg," with the smaller subtext "continue" positioned directly beneath it. the rightmost button is labeled "exit." the overall visual presentation strongly suggests a title screen for a japanese role-playing game (jrpg),skillfully evoking a sense of mystery,adventure,and nostalgia through its thematic elements,character designs,and dedicated retro pixel art execution.
在画面底部，三个独特的矩形按钮水平排列，这体现了电子游戏主菜单界面的典型特征。这些按钮采用像素化斜面效果渲染，略带三维效果。每个按钮都以粗体无衬线像素字体显示大写英文。最左侧的按钮显示“开始”。中间的按钮显示“jrpg”，其下方则显示较小的副标题“继续”。最右侧的按钮显示“退出”。整体视觉效果强烈地暗示着一款日式角色扮演游戏 (jrpg) 的标题画面，巧妙地通过其主题元素、角色设计和精致的复古像素艺术营造出神秘、冒险和怀旧的氛围。

原Tag：the image captures a young woman,presumably a musician,in an engaged moment of performance. she is the central figure,presented in a medium close-up shot,angled slightly to the viewer's left. her head is tilted downwards,her gaze directed towards the instrument she is playing or slightly away from the microphone. dark,wavy,shoulder-length hair frames her face,emerging from beneath a black,peaked military-style cap which features a gold-colored circular emblem,possibly a wreath or insignia,on its front. her facial features are distinct,with a pale complexion providing a contrast to her dark hair and the vibrant red lipstick applied to her full lips. she appears to be singing or have just finished a vocal line,as her lips are slightly parted near a black,professional-grade microphone mounted on a stand positioned directly before her.
her attire consists of a dark navy or black zip-up jacket,which is worn partially unzipped and draped off her left shoulder. this reveals a significant portion of her left arm and shoulder,as well as a white or light-colored v-neck top underneath. the open v-neck of the top and the way the jacket is worn expose a considerable area of her upper chest and cleavage. an in-ear monitor is visible in her left ear,indicative of a professional musical performance setting. clipped to her jacket,near her left armpit,is a small,dark rectangular electronic device,likely a wireless transmitter pack for her instrument or microphone.
she is actively playing a reddish-brown electric bass guitar,identified by its four thick strings and the visible headstock with tuning pegs. her right hand is captured fretting the strings on the neck of the guitar. a patterned guitar strap,predominantly green with intricate lighter-colored details,runs over her right shoulder and diagonally across her chest,supporting the instrument. the background of the photograph is softly blurred,creating a bokeh effect,which emphasizes the subject. this out-of-focus backdrop consists of diffuse shapes in pale pink and blue hues,with larger,bright circular forms in the upper left quadrant that suggest out-of-focus stage lights or other elements of a performance venue. the overall impression is one of concentration and artistic expression within a live music environment.
翻译：照片捕捉到了一位年轻女子，大概是一位音乐家，正沉浸在表演之中。她是画面中心人物，以中特写镜头呈现，角度略微偏向观看者的左侧。她低着头，目光直视着正在演奏的乐器，或略微远离麦克风。一头齐肩的深色波浪卷发勾勒出她的脸庞，从一顶黑色尖顶军帽下露出，帽檐上有一个金色的圆形徽章，可能是花环或徽章。她的五官清晰，苍白的肤色与她深色的头发和涂在丰满嘴唇上的鲜艳红色唇膏形成鲜明对比。她似乎正在唱歌，或者刚刚唱完一段歌，因为她的嘴唇微微张开，靠近一个黑色的专业级麦克风，麦克风就架在她正前方的支架上。她的着装是一件深蓝色或黑色的拉链夹克，拉链部分拉开，披在她的左肩上。照片中，她左臂和左肩的大部分露了出来，里面是一件白色或浅色的v领上衣。v领的敞开和夹克的穿法，让她上胸部和乳沟的大片区域都暴露在外。她的左耳上戴着一个入耳式耳机，这表明她身处专业的音乐表演场所。她的夹克上，靠近左腋窝的地方，夹着一个小型的深色矩形电子设备，很可能是她乐器或麦克风的无线发射器。

原Tag：the artwork depicts a vibrant coastal landscape under a bright,cloud-dappled sky. in the lower right foreground,two figures,viewed from behind,stand upon a grassy and rocky slope overlooking the water. they appear equipped for a journey,each wearing a wide-brimmed,straw-like hat and carrying a substantial backpack; the figure on the left leans on a wooden walking stick,while the one on the right has coiled rope and other gear attached to their pack. their gaze is directed towards the scene unfolding before them: a tranquil bay and a prominent headland. the shoreline curves from the left foreground into the middle ground,composed of earth-toned rocks and pebbles of varying sizes,some partially submerged in the clear,turquoise water where underwater stones are visible through the calm surface. jutting into the bay from the left is a small peninsula or headland,dominated by a large,ancient-looking tree with a distinctive,gnarled structure. its substantial trunk features exposed,pale,almost white bark interspersed with streaks of reddish-brown,twisting upwards towards a dense canopy of green foliage. several white birds are depicted in flight around the tree and scattered across the expansive blue sky. the water of the bay reflects the bright sky,transitioning from turquoise near the shore to deeper blues further out. across the water,a hazy,distant landmass forms the horizon line. the sky itself is rendered with dynamic,loose brushstrokes,conveying a sense of light and atmosphere with soft white clouds against the cerulean backdrop. white text in a handwritten style is overlaid at the top,reading "artwork by frank","to the beach",and the date "2025.4.16". the entire composition is framed by a thin,slightly textured white border.

原Tag：an awe-inspiring necromancer stands in a dark,foreboding wasteland,draped in tattered black and emerald-green robes glowing with arcane energy. his skeletal hands hold a twisted staff radiating pulsating green light,as streams of vibrant green magic swirl and erupt into the air,forming ghostly apparitions and skeletal figures. the necromancer's eyes blaze with an eerie glow,while the cracked earth beneath him glows with ancient runes. a swirling vortex of green mist and energy surrounds him,casting eerie shadows under a stormy sky lit by flashes of lightning. highly detailed,cinematic lighting,dark fantasy aesthetic,with dramatic contrasts and dynamic magical effects.

a digital illustration in a dreamy,magical style,it features a young magical girl soaring through the night sky. the background is a deep,star-speckled sky with wisps of dark clouds and faint,glowing constellations scattered across the canvas
she wears a layered pink dress that flutters in the air,with flowing ribbons and frilled sleeves glowing softly under the moonlight. her expression is resolute and fierce,her bright red eyes locked forward.,
the girl has long,silver-white hair streaming behind her as she flies,her arms outstretched. behind her are a pair of translucent,multicolored wings shaped like shifting,flame-like butterflies,made of iridescent magical fire in hues of violet,blue,and pink.
in her hand,she holds a golden wand that radiates power — the tip glows with intense magical energy,as it fires a brilliant,rainbow-colored beam of light downward. the beam twists and pulses,lighting up the darkness with a sense of power and urgency.,
the overall artwork is rich in detail,with sharp,dynamic lines that emphasize motion,magic,and emotion. the strong contrast between the dark background and the vivid magical effects makes the figure stand out with dramatic intensity,capturing the spirit of a determined magical heroine in the heat of battle.

原Tag：this is a digital painting in a highly expressionist style,filled with a chaotic and violent energy. a vague human figure occupies the center of the frame. its facial features are rendered unrecognizable by rough,powerful brushstrokes and splattered colors,making it seem as if it's undergoing a violent disintegration or letting out a scream. the color palette is dominated by deep blacks,fiery reds,and stark yellows. these high-contrast colors collide and merge,creating a visual effect reminiscent of burning or an explosion. the brushwork is wild and unconventional,featuring a mix of heavy textures,sharp scratching marks,and splattered spots. these chaotic textures combine to construct the figure's inner turmoil,be it pain,rage,or ecstasy. light seems to burst forth from within the figure itself,especially in the facial area,where highlights of red and yellow resemble burning embers,creating a stark contrast with the surrounding darkness. the overall atmosphere of the painting is dark,surreal,and charged with a raw,unrestrained emotional power.

原Tag：a young man with spiky dark hair and a somber expression stands in a futuristic city at dusk. he is shown from the waist up,in three-quarters profile,looking down and to his left. he wears a tattered,high-collared black coat that appears weathered and shredded,billowing around him. on his right hand is a black fingerless glove,and this hand rests on the hilt of a katana-style sword. the blade of the sword is not traditional metal but is composed of brilliant,crackling purple energy,akin to lightning,which casts a strong magenta glow on his clothes,arm,and the ground. he is set against a sprawling cityscape of towering,dark skyscrapers with glowing windows in shades of blue,orange,and purple. in the upper right background,a bright blue neon sign on a building reads "nexus-09". the sky is a deep,dark blue,streaked with wispy reddish-pink clouds. the ground appears wet,reflecting the neon lights of the city. the composition is shot from a slightly low angle,with a shallow depth of field that keeps the man and his sword in sharp focus while the cityscape behind him is softly blurred.
翻译：一位年轻男子，一头黑色尖刺，表情阴沉，站在黄昏时分的未来城市中。画面中，他上半身呈四分之三的侧面像，目光向下，目光左倾。他身穿一件破旧的高领黑色外套，饱经风霜，衣衫褴褛，在身旁飘动。他的右手戴着一只黑色的露指手套，这只手握着一把武士刀式长剑的剑柄。剑刃并非传统的金属材质，而是由闪耀的、噼啪作响的紫色能量构成，如同闪电，将他的衣服、手臂和地面投射出强烈的洋红色光芒。他身后是一片广阔的城市景观，高耸入云，摩天大楼鳞次栉比，窗户散发着蓝、橙、紫三色的光芒。画面右上方，一栋建筑上亮蓝色的霓虹灯招牌上写着“Nexus-09”。天空是深蓝色的，点缀着缕缕红粉色的云朵。地面看起来是湿的，反射着城市的霓虹灯。构图是从略低的角度拍摄的，景深较浅，使男人和他的剑保持清晰的焦点，而他身后的城市景观则柔和地模糊了。

原Tag：the scene is rendered with dramatic light and a dark theme,where the vibrant red elements appear to glow in the dark.
set against a stark black background,a female warrior with short white hair and glowing red eyes is depicted in a dynamic,low-slung action pose. she wears a traditional conical straw hat,or sugegasa,which casts a shadow over the upper half of her face. her attire is a blend of martial and stylized elements,including a dark,billowing cloak with a red lining that frays and splashes into the surrounding darkness. she is dressed in a revealing top with black wrappings over her chest,black arm guards,and thigh-high black stockings. a red cord with tassels is tied around her waist. in a motion suggesting immense speed,she is sliding down a sharp diagonal,gripping the hilt of a katana with a vibrant red blade that is partially drawn from its black scabbard. the background is punctuated by a large,solid red circle resembling a blood moon,and the entire scene is animated by violent splashes and streaks of red,white,and grey,evoking a sense of powerful movement and conflict.

原Tag：1girl,scarf,cape,armor,the scene utilizes dramatic,moody lighting characterized by a dark theme where vibrant elements provide strong,glow-in-the-dark illumination,creating high contrast. a young woman with long hair,tinged with blue and purple highlights from the ambient neon light,crouches low,gazing directly forward with large,eyes. her pose is grounded and assertive,one hand placed firmly on the surface before her,which is itself marked by splashes of vivid magenta energy. dominating the space behind her is a colossal monster. this spectral figure appears composed of pure energy that swirls and splashes dynamically against the deep black void of the background. its mouth is wide open in a fierce roar,revealing sharp,glowing fangs in a potent display of untamed power. in the immediate foreground,beneath the woman,bold,jagged graffiti-style lettering rendered in acidic green proclaims a fragmented word,possibly "code vein," contributing to the overall urban,high-energy feel. the composition skillfully blends detailed character illustration with abstract energy forms and graphic text elements,creating a visually striking narrative steeped in neon-drenched atmosphere and futuristic style.
翻译：画面中,一位年轻女子身披围巾、斗篷和盔甲,运用了戏剧性的氛围灯光,以暗色调为主,鲜艳的元素则在黑暗中发出强烈的荧光,形成鲜明的对比。她长发披肩,在霓虹灯光的映衬下泛着蓝紫色的光泽,低身蹲伏,目光炯炯地直视前方。她的姿态沉稳而坚定,一只手牢牢地按在面前的地面上,地面上闪烁着鲜艳的洋红色能量。在她身后,一个巨大的怪物占据了主导地位。这个幽灵般的身影似乎由纯粹的能量构成,在深邃的黑色背景中动态地旋转、飞溅。它张开血盆大口,发出凶猛的咆哮,露出锋利闪亮的獠牙,展现出一股狂野的力量。在画面前景,女子下方,醒目而锯齿状的涂鸦风格字母以酸性绿色呈现,拼凑出一个破碎的词语,可能是“code vein”（代码静脉）,增强了整体的都市感和活力。构图巧妙地融合了细致的人物插画、抽象的能量形态和图形化的文字元素,创造出一个视觉冲击力极强、充满霓虹灯光和未来主义风格的叙事故事。

structures,featuring visible,textured brushstrokes that blend forms and contribute to the atmospheric rendering.the scene is characterized by soft lighting and weak light,diffused by heavy fog,creating a moody atmosphere.the composition depicts a vast,snow-covered landscape shrouded in dense fog. in the lower center-right foreground,a solitary figure,diminutive against the imposing backdrop,stands cloaked and facing towards a complex of traditional east asian architectural structures. the foreground consists of uneven,dark,snow-dusted ground,with bare,skeletal branches reaching into the frame from the lower left,enhancing the desolate feel. occupying the midground are substantial buildings,including a wide,multi-tiered temple-like structure on the left and a tall,imposing pagoda piercing the fog on the right,both heavily laden with snow and exhibiting signs of significant weathering or perhaps neglect. thin cables or wires are faintly discernible,strung between these primary structures. the pervasive fog is a dominant element,enveloping the bases of the buildings and progressively obscuring architectural details with distance,contributing significantly to the strong sense of atmospheric perspective. further indistinct shapes,suggesting more distant traditional structures and potentially even the faint silhouettes of modern skyscrapers,loom ethereally in the deep background,almost entirely consumed by the thick mist. the overall mood conveyed is one of profound solitude,piercing coldness,and quiet mystery,set within a desolate yet visually striking environment that evokes a sense of forgotten grandeur or a post-event stillness.
原Tag：a girl,drenched in blood and clothed in torn remnants,stands amidst a crumbling ruin,gazing directly at the viewer with an emotionless expression. her eyes glow with an intense,piercing red light that cuts through the dust-filled air like twin embers in the dark.the entire scene is awash in shades of red—deep,shadowed crimsons blending with sharp scarlet highlights. the ruined surroundings are littered with shattered concrete,twisted metal,and scorched fragments of once-standing structures. faint trails of smoke curl up from the wreckage,tinted red by a flickering light source offscreen. sparks crackle faintly in the distance,and glowing cracks in the earth hint at a violent power still simmering beneath the surface. the atmosphere is suffocating—silent,yet thrumming with restrained chaos,as though the world has paused in awe or fear of her presence. every element of the scene builds toward a climax not yet seen,steeped in dramatic stillness and looming dread.

翻译：1girl，独奏，绝对巅峰伊藤润二黑白噩梦，零灰，只有纯粹的墨水和虚空，女孩的脸垂直分裂成完美的左右镜像，但每一半都在无尽的牙齿撕咬螺旋中吞噬着另一半，眼睛被无底的螺旋状黑洞取代，甚至连画面边缘都被吸入其中，舌头伸长成带倒钩的钻头，刺穿自己的额头，从后脑勺穿出，仍在旋转，头发变成成千上万节的蜈蚣腿，从头皮爬出又钻回，脖子扭转540度，脊椎骨清晰可见地从皮肤中凸出，形成完美的网点，手臂伸长到不可能的长度，缠绕躯干七圈，手指融化成滴落的墨水，在她的肋骨上形成新的尖叫嘴巴，制服被撕成锋利的纸条，割破她自己的血肉，而血液则被画成执拗的交叉阴影线，形成她尖叫的更小副本脸庞，背景已然消逝，只剩下无限循环的螺旋状画面，同一个女孩逐渐破碎，与纸张融为一体，书页边缘渗出黑色的脓液，对话框里填满了难以辨认的螺旋状书法，令人目眩神迷，每一笔都以杀气腾腾的精准手绘而成，细节密度极高，瞬间丧失理智，纯粹而又令人毛骨悚然的宇宙恐怖，一旦目睹便无法忘怀。

翻译：炼金术士公会大师们正在进行一项宏大的实验，观察反应，记录结果。他们身穿华丽长袍，外面套着防护围裙，戴着玻璃镜片眼镜，操作着由铜和玻璃制成的复杂仪器。烧瓶里盛着五颜六色的液体，冒着气泡。宽敞的作坊里，锻炉和煤气灯散发出光芒，照亮了整个空间。架子上摆满了装在罐子里的稀有原料，中央是一张巨大的工作台。黑暗的石头墙壁与温暖的光线形成鲜明的对比，化学反应散发出光芒， swirling的烟雾捕捉着光线。整个场景弥漫着探索和一丝危险的气氛。镜头中景拍摄，聚焦于这群专注的人，细节清晰，质感丰富。

翻译：这是一幅引人注目的数码动漫插画，描绘了一位调皮的狐狸女孩。画面以黑白灰为主色调，点缀着鲜艳的红色。她标志性的黑色双马尾辫，发梢渐变为亮红色，刘海中也挑染了一缕醒目的红色，一双锐利的红眼睛透过一副圆形金属框眼镜凝视着前方。头顶上长着一对蓬松的大黑耳朵，内里是白色的绒毛，耳尖是红色的，还装饰着红色的丝带蝴蝶结和金色的小铃铛。她那条又粗又蓬松的黑色尾巴，尾巴尖也渐变为红色，卷曲地垂在身旁。她身着一套时髦的宽松街头服饰：短袖印花T恤叠穿在长袖T恤外面，下身是宽松的工装裤，腰间系着一条醒目的红色帆布腰带，脚上穿着休闲运动鞋。她随意地坐在铺着瓷砖的城市人行道上，舒适地倚靠在一家大型玻璃橱窗前。她双腿放松，一只手俏皮地将眼镜往下拉了拉，自信地笑着直视着镜头，露出可爱的龅牙。背景是错综复杂的霓虹灯管，在深色玻璃后闪闪发光。画面采用高对比度的戏剧性光线，黑白分明的画面中只有鲜艳的红色元素——她的眼睛、渐变的发色、耳朵和尾巴尖、丝带和腰带——格外醒目，营造出一种酷炫、前卫且极具风格化的都市氛围。
